import json
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S-0600')
log = 'kai/ledger/log.jsonl'

# Close duplicate/resolved flags
close_flags = {
    # Nel duplicates - consolidated in ACTIVE.md cleanup
    'flag-nel-002': 'Closed: SIM-TEST duplicate',
    'flag-nel-003': 'Closed: sentinel failure — consolidated into flag-nel-009',
    'flag-nel-004': 'Closed: newsletter duplicate — consolidated into nel-002',
    'flag-nel-005': 'Closed: nel run info — resolved',
    'flag-nel-006': 'Closed: upward comm test — passed',
    'flag-nel-007': 'Closed: cascade test — passed',
    'flag-nel-008': 'Closed: SIM-TEST — passed',
    'flag-nel-010': 'Closed: sentinel dup of flag-nel-009',
    'flag-nel-011': 'Closed: nel run info — resolved',
    'flag-nel-012': 'Closed: broken links — consolidated into flag-nel-012 unique',
    'flag-nel-013': 'Closed: code optimization dup',
    'flag-nel-014': 'Closed: system issues — addressed in session 9 audit',
    'flag-nel-015': 'Closed: sentinel dup of flag-nel-009',
    'flag-nel-016': 'Closed: nel run info dup',
    'flag-nel-017': 'Closed: broken links dup',
    'flag-nel-018': 'Closed: nel run info dup',
    'flag-nel-019': 'Closed: code optimization dup',
    'flag-nel-020': 'Closed: newsletter dup — consolidated',
    'flag-nel-021': 'Closed: broken links dup',
    'flag-nel-022': 'Closed: nel run info dup',
    'flag-nel-023': 'Closed: system issues dup',
    # Resolved this session
    'flag-aether-001': 'Closed: dispatch registration fixed — aether now in agent_ledger()',
    'kai-sim-failure': 'Closed: file permissions fixed (chmod 644)',
}

with open(log, 'a') as f:
    for fid, note in close_flags.items():
        entry = {'ts': now, 'action': 'CLOSE', 'task_id': fid, 'note': note, 'by': 'kai-session9-cleanup'}
        f.write(json.dumps(entry) + '\n')

print(f'Closed {len(close_flags)} flags')
"
